title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO PATRICIA V. ROSAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 11697 / 65 OG No. 28, 7122 (July 14, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5437, September 09, 1968 ]

AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO PATRICIA V. ROSAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Patricia V. Rosal is hereby granted Philippine citizenship with all the rights, privileges and prerogatives appurtenant thereto.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, September 9, 1968.
